title: Intensely Rich Russian Peach Pudding
description: A rich and dense Russian dessert featuring peach juice, made with a bain-marie for a smooth and creamy texture, and is keto-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a medium saucepan, whisk together the heavy cream, peach juice, and granulated sweetener over medium heat until the sweetener is dissolved.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, vanilla extract, and lemon zest.
Temper the egg mixture by slowly pouring the warm cream mixture into the eggs, whisking constantly.
Pour the mixture into 6 small ramekins or cups.
Place the ramekins in a large baking dish and add hot water to come halfway up the sides of the ramekins.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the edges are set and the centers are still slightly jiggly.
Remove the pudding from the water bath and let cool to room temperature.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
